claim_results.claim: If the mapping holds in two independent domains, the universality claim becomes serious.
The wavefunction evolves according to the Schrödinger equation — a perfectly smooth, deterministic, reversible evolution.
The measurement basis — what property you choose to measure — determines which eigenstates are available as outcomes.
Choosing to measure spin-z gives different results than choosing to measure spin-x, even on the same particle.
The system has entered a different regime. — The Structural Claim These five properties are not arbitrary.
Days, years, centuries — the text is silent because the duration is irrelevant to the physics.
It is a specific claim: different measurement operators produce different eigenstates.
The Same Shape in a Completely Different Domain One cross-domain mapping proves nothing.

UNIVERSALITY CLAIM: When the same five-property structure appears in quantum superposition, phase transitions, and the Genesis Fall narrative — three independent domains — the structure is not coincidental.
The physics reading makes a stronger claim: the two trees represent two distinct physical operators acting on the same system simultaneously.
The Redemption arc requires mortality as a structural feature.

Paul writes with clinical precision across three texts: "Therefore, just as sin came into the world through one man, and death through sin, and so death spread to all men because all sinned." — Romans 5:12 "For as by the one man's disobedience the many were made sinners, so by the one man's obedience the many will be made righteous." — Romans 5:19 "For as in Adam all die, so also in Christ shall all be made alive." — 1 Corinthians 15:22 "Adam was not deceived, but the woman was deceived and became a transgressor." — 1 Timothy 2:14 The doctrine of federal headship holds that Adam served as the representative head of humanity.
Wigner's Friend requires the external observer to be in a position to re-coherently superpose the internal observer's system.
A system requires sufficient environmental entanglement to fully collapse.
The Eve-Adam asymmetry implies that the universe does not treat all observers equivalently.
The effect is small — roughly one part in ten thousand — but it is real, replicated, and implies that consciousness is not a passive observer of quantum systems.
All six together constitute a body of evidence.
In current physics, light requires a source.
The particle does not have a definite spin until you measure it; measurement constitutes the definiteness.
In physics, boundary conditions determine which solutions to a differential equation are physically realizable.

The serpent attacks the boundary condition directly — "you will not surely die" — because destabilizing the boundary condition is the mechanism by which the system is pushed toward the measurement event.
When the same logical structure appears in three independent domains, the universality claim becomes serious.
It is an empirical claim about observer hierarchy that, if true, requires new physics.
If phase transitions fail to exhibit any of the five properties in the same structural relation, the universality claim collapses.

If current quantum mechanics — without modification — can account for a complete physical interaction producing zero wavefunction collapse, followed by a second identical interaction producing total collapse, then the "new physics" claim is unnecessary.
The 6.35σ result anchors the observer-authority claim.
The paper is not falsified by this alone, but the strongest physical evidence for observer authority is removed.
Every claim in this paper falls into one of three categories.
It is testable physics, not interpretation.
This is a negative claim about current theory.
Dismissal requires engagement with the methodology, not with priors.
Claims that overreach the evidence.
The language is evocative and the John 1 connection is real, but "constitutes reality" is too strong for this paper's evidence base.
The Logos-as-observer claim requires a separate treatment.
This is theologically defensible (Hebrews 8:5, 10:1) but the physics claim — that current quantum mechanics is a degraded approximation of a higher-coherence substrate — is extrapolation.
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.
PEAR-LAB's 6.35σ anomaly anchors the empirical claim that observer role, not coupling strength, governs collapse.
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim is held to explicit falsification standards.
Every equation that appears in this article, collected in one place.
Evolves smoothly under the Schrödinger equation until measurement collapses it.
Schrödinger Equation The deterministic, reversible evolution equation for the wavefunction between measurements.
Measurement Basis The set of eigenstates determined by the observable being measured.
Same Master-Equation variable, two coordinate names: "entropy" in the physics frame, "sin" in the theological frame.
Considered as a candidate explanation for the Eve-Adam asymmetry, ruled insufficient because it is energy-based, not role-based.
Same Master-Equation variable, two coordinate names: “entropy” in the physics frame, “sin” in the theological frame.
